blocks.content: Diego was on his steps. Different jacket. Same spot.
Diego was on his steps. I almost walked past him.
Diego was on his steps. I was still three days away from Thursday in my head.
Diego was on his steps. He was the first thing I saw that wasn't the inside of my own head.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: Like you're somewhere else in your head. You got a girl problem?

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: That's exactly what somebody with a girl problem says.
He was twelve. Thirteen maybe. And he said it like he'd seen this before.

blocks.speaker: Diego
blocks.content: Yeah aight. She like you back though.
He said it like a statement. Then he went back to whatever he was looking at on the stoop and I kept walking.
